abilities.description: You are a walking armory, with a weapon for every occasion. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} in personal combat, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. Once per fight, when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by switching weapons or changing tactics, take an automatic strong hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} using a weapon which has limited projectiles or uses, add +1 and mark progress on a hit. Then, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1). If you score a strong hit on this attack and immediately @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.3129f4caa4754caf]{Take Decisive Action}, you may retain the value of one challenge die from your @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} action instead of rolling that die.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by arming up and gathering your gear for a perilous encounter or mission, you may roll +supply. If you do, take +2 momentum on a hit.
